name: Greek-Style String Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off the ends of the beans and wash them in cold water.
2. Cut into pieces or slice lengthwise (French style).
3. Sauté the onions until they are translucent.
4. Add the string beans and all other ingredients to the pan.
5. Add enough water (about 1 cup) to cook the string beans throughly.
Note: Other vegetables that can be prepared this way include fava beans, potatoes, okra, eggplant, and chick peas. A combination of string beans, potatoes, carrots, and celery makes a tasty one-dish meal.
